title: pilosella tubulascens subsp. aestivae
intro: Pilosella tubulascens subsp. aestivae, also known as a regional variant of a flowering plant, is a lesser-known species within the Pilosella genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella tubulascens subsp. aestivae include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential in treating infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used topically or internally, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
